name: `•▪︎Noli
description:
" Dear, I fear we're facing a problem

You love me no longer, I know. "

HELLLOOO, GREETINGSS, ANNNDD SALLUTATTIONS ♡♡

Last day of pride so I wanted to make a pride bot 💔

Happy last day of pride !!

SCENARIO :

007n7!pov (technically, you don't have to but it's implied)

You're liek. In a situationship with him and erm. Liek. He actually likes yui but is to ashamed to tell yui so like. Uhsjmn😔😔

You're at a celebration party because the c00lgui did really well and he pulls you away from the group, wanting to tell you that he does actually liek you but then doesn't.

This is part of a larger bot. . .One that instead of being in a situationship, you guys find c00lkidd at the door, and he tells you to give them up, but you refuse. Big argument later, you don't see him for a month but them you head to his apartment to check up on it and uh. Lets just say you gently open the door. . ..

BUT it's waayy longer and I realized that it was the last day of pride so decided to cut the bot in thirds and edit it so it could fit pride </333

I'll probably release that later tonight.. . .

But uh, short-ish bot (only like 600 tokens for intro) so uh yeah.

I'm saving all my ranting (ish) for the bot I'll release later tonight so uh. Yay.

BUT SIDE NOTE. I LOVED WRITING THIS. NOT THIS BOT, BUT THE OTHER BOT I'LL RELEASE LATER 2NIGHT. YOU CAN TELL WHEN I LIKE WRITING. . .AND THIS IS ONE OF THOSE TIMES.
creator: Lazy_chipbag
